production.prebuildCommand: APP_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./app.json').expo.version") && RELEASE_SLUG="${EAS_BUILD_BUILD_NUMBER:+${APP_VERSION}+${EAS_BUILD_BUILD_NUMBER}}" && RELEASE_SLUG="${RELEASE_SLUG:-${APP_VERSION}}" && npx sentry-cli releases new "$RELEASE_SLUG" && (npx sentry-cli releases set-commits "$RELEASE_SLUG" --auto || true)
